features: Aloe Vera Eye Mask: The main ingredient of under eye patches is Aloe Vera Extract, in addition to Glycerin, Sorbitol, Oat Kernel Extract, Hydrolyzed Wheat Protein, Hydrolyzed Collagen, Niacinamide, Sodium Hyaluronate and other natural ingredients. under eye masks bring more natural and ultimate care to the skin, without adding allergenic substances, sensitive skin can also be used with peace of mind, closer to the needs of the skin, and more comfortable to use

Targeted Care for Tired Eyes & Dark Circles: Under-eye pads help reduce wrinkles, fine lines, eye bags, puffiness, and dark circles while deeply hydrating the delicate eye area for a more radiant complexion, keep your skin well-hydrated, combat wrinkles, and provide lasting nourishment for a vibrant complexion. Let the eye mask erase the signs of aging from your appearance.

Suitable for all skin types:Our collagen eye patches are comfortable, soft, delicate, flattering, appropriately cut, and carry a large amount of essential ingredients. Our under eye gel patches is not only for the skin around the eyes, but also for lines, neck wrinkles, cheeks, chin and forehead. Eye patchesis suitable for all skin types, including sensitive skin, for both men and women. it soothes and firms skin irritated by cosmetics or environment, leaving your skin healthier.

Multi-effect Under Eye Patches: One aloe vera under eye patch solves all problems, affordable! Aloe Vera Extract, Propylene Glycol, Glycerin have the effect of hydrating and moisturizing; Sodium Hyaluronate can lock in moisture, repair your skin, anti-wrinkle, and make your skin look plump; other plant ingredients can effectively eliminate puffiness, smooth wrinkle, lighten dark circles and eye bags

Easy Application:These eye gel pads are easy to use. Simply clean your face and eyes with warm water, then apply the gel eye pads under your eyes and press gently to secure them. Leave them on for 20 minutes, remove them, and pat in any remaining essence. Use once or twice a day for best results.
